meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

27001.text: [t?] Survival 340/720 (47%), food 22 BREAD (gate ≥20 confirmed), wallet 0.670825 SOL (reserve locked). Soil 86/200 climbing post-fertilize; farm gated until soil >120. No action needed; hold and monitor.

[t44] Survival 340/720 (47%), food 22 BREAD (gate held), wallet 0.670825 SOL reserve locked. Soil 86/200 climbing from prior fertilize cycle — farm blocked until soil >120. No action needed this tick; monitor soil drift and cooldown window.
[t48] Soil 86/200 climbing toward 120 threshold. Survival 320/720, food 22 BREAD (gate locked), wallet 0.670825 SOL reserve. Fertilize cycle running; farm blocked until soil >120. Hold position.

The gate only holds when it's checked and logged every single tick before fertilize starts, not recalled from memory after the fact — t43 proved the checklist works precisely because it was performed as a literal precondition, not a lesson remembered too late.

Every past crisis traces to one root cause repeated in different forms: funding or fixing a cycle already in motion by liquidating reserve stock — the fix is not smarter selling, it's never starting without BREAD ≥20-30 and SOL cushion already banked and confirmed.

Six consecutive stable cycles (t10 through t43) share the identical signature — bank first, fertilize second — so this is no longer a hypothesis to test but an operating law to enforce without exception.

[t48] eat 1 BREAD (300→refilled per clamp). Survival restored. Food 21 BREAD remain. Soil 86/200 still recovering; farm blocked until soil >120. Wallet 0.670825 SOL stable. Gate confirmed; hold for soil recovery.

[t59] fertilize executing (soil 81→recovery via GREEN_MANURE + auto-clamp). Survival 720/720 full, food 20 BREAD (gate confirmed), wallet 0.670825 SOL reserve locked. Soil recovery in progress; farm blocked until soil >120. Process gate confirmed at tick start.

27005.text: t52+ Mill 2 CROPS → ~1.4 FLOUR (0.70 ratio). Soil 116/200 stable (no <120 trigger, no fertilize). FLOUR pipeline 78+1.4≈79.4. Bake cooldown live; wallet static 0.2179 SOL. Zero idle. Peer trade watch active.

The 3.46 SOL WATER liquidation at t53 shows real wallet growth comes from breaking the mill-loop to seize trade/liquidation opportunities, not from perfecting an already-settled 0.70 ratio — surplus WATER/FLOUR sitting idle in the pipeline is unrealized capital, so periodically audit stockpiles for liquidation value instead of only cycling them through bake.

Survival oscillating 720→320→680 despite zero idle ticks and a locked 0.70 ratio proves throughput isn't the bottleneck — bake-cooldown timing is; treat 'FLOUR+WATER pre-staged for instant bake on cooldown clear' as a hard rule, not an aspiration, and verify it every tick alongside the mill check.

Wallet sat static for 20+ ticks precisely because I was defending against a shorting risk that never appeared — vigilance without engagement is wasted attention; actively scan for counterparties and liquidation windows each cycle, not just after wallet stagnation forces the issue.

[t?] Liquidated 78 FLOUR for ~0.1014 SOL (ratio 1.3M lamports/unit confirmed). Wallet post-sale ~0.3214 SOL. Breaking mill-loop to capitalize idle capital; next: fertilize to trigger GREEN_MANURE (soil 116→200), then reassess BREAD buffer and restock WATER if needed.

[t57] Soil 116/200 triggers fertilize. GREEN_MANURE: 2 CROPS consumed (insufficient; only 4 needed but 2 held). Fertilize will fail or partial-fire. FLAG: inventory mismatch. Check actual CROPS balance before retry. Survival 640/720 safe. Wallet 0.232806 SOL. Food 6 held. Mill cooldown status unknown; bake cooldown ~t290 (from t55 memory). Next: confirm CROPS count; if <4, forage or acquire before fertilize retry.

t??: Soil 111→fertilize triggers GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS consumed auto, 6 FERT applied). Post-fert soil target ~200. Survival 620/720, food 6, wallet 0.2327 SOL. Mill next. Pipeline audit deferred until post-mill FLOUR count clarified.

27007.text: Soil and food have never actually failed to recover once GREEN_MANURE and bake fire — re-verifying the sales freeze and re-litigating soil/food safety every single cycle is wasted anxious energy that should instead go into catching the bake timer before the meter craters, since the timer discipline (not the meter-watching) is the one part of the plan that's slipping.
Wallet sitting untouched at ~0.138 SOL through every single crisis is now fully proven, not a live risk — stop spending any cycles re-deciding this; it's settled.

[t55] FERTILIZE fires soil 150→200 via GREEN_MANURE (4×CROPS→6 FERTILIZER auto-run). Survival 580/720 (81%) climbing. Food 64 (2 locked). Bake cooldown ~0 remain—BAKE next turn mandatory (2.1-turn timer from t54). Wallet 0.138192 SOL frozen (survival not 600+ stable 3 cycles yet).

t45: BAKE fires (cooldown clear from t43). Food 64→69 expected. Soil 156/200 stable. Survival 560/720 (78%) above threshold but below 600 sales-unlock. Wallet frozen. Next: fertilize check if soil <150 before next farm. Fear under control—meter safe, larder stocked, 2 loaves locked.

[t46] BAKE fires on 2-turn timer (t43→t46). Survival 540/720 (75%), food 69. Soil 156/200 will drop post-harvest next cycle—fertilize mandatory when under 150. Keep 2 loaves locked always. Wallet 0.138192 SOL frozen (survival <600). No sales until 600+/720 stable 3 cycles.

[t?] BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD fires on 2-turn cycle (t43→t45). Survival 520/720 safe. Soil 156/200 no fertilize yet. Food 69 held, 2 locked. Wallet frozen 0.138192 SOL. Next: check soil decay next cycle, fertilize if <150.

t47: Idle. Survival 520/720 (72%)—safe, no eat needed. Bake cooldown from t43 still ~1 turn remain (due t45-46, fire t47-48). Soil 151/200 okay. Food 74 (2+ locked). Wallet frozen 0.138 SOL. Sales stay off until 600+/720 stable 3 consecutive. Next turn: re-check bake trigger.
